title: liatris heterophylla
intro: Liatris heterophylla, also known as Rattlesnake root, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Liatris genus of flowering plants. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Liatris heterophylla include its ability to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and a diuretic. Liatris heterophylla can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in herbal remedies for its antiviral and anti-parasitic properties.
